section-84.title: Childminder agencies
section-84.content: Schedule 4 (amendments to the Childcare Act 2006 to provide for the registration of childminder agencies on the childcare registers and the registration of certain childcare providers with those agencies, and other related amendments) has effect.

section-85.title: Inspections at request of providers of childcare to young children
section-85.content: In section 49 of the Childcare Act 2006 (inspections of early years provision), after subsection (5) insert—/nTEXT REMOVED. MUST NOT BE ANNOTATED

section-86.title: Repeal of local authority's duty to assess sufficiency of childcare provision
section-86.content: Section 11 of the Childcare Act 2006 (duty of local authority in England to assess sufficiency of childcare provision) is repealed.

section-87.title: Discharge of authority's duty to secure free early years provision
section-87.content: (1)Part 1 of the Childcare Act 2006 (general functions of local authorities in England in relation to childcare) is amended as follows./n(2)After section 7 (duty to secure early years provision free of charge in accordance with regulations) insert—

section-88.title: Governing bodies: provision of community facilities
section-88.content: (1)Section 28 of the Education Act 2002 (limits on the powers of governing bodies of maintained schools to provide community facilities etc under section 27) is amended as follows./n(2)In subsection (4), for “a governing body” substitute“ the governing body of a maintained school in Wales ”./n(3)Omit subsection (4C)./n(4)In subsection (5)—/n(a)for “a governing body” substitute“ the governing body of a maintained school in Wales ”, and/n(b)in paragraph (a) omit “(in relation to England) by the Secretary of State or (in relation to Wales)”.

section-89.title: Childcare costs scheme: preparatory expenditure
section-89.content: The Commissioners for Her Majesty's Revenue and Customs may incur expenditure in preparing for the introduction of a scheme for providing assistance in respect of the costs of childcare.
